race.comment: SIR ARTIE (12) looks to have strengthened up over the break and has his hoof on the till third-up. Circled the field from last on the turn with a slashing fifth over 1400m at this track. Well in with just the 54kg after the claim. Expected to go close. ROMEO'S CHOICE (2) has a good record over this track and trip and gave 5kg to Band Of Brothers when second here last January. Fourth-up with the 3kg claimer and can figure prominently. DARK GLITTER (3) was rewarded for her consistency last start when backed at the big odds to salute over 1200m here with plenty up her sleeve. Just as effective over the 1300m and Roper keeps the ride. COCO JAMBOO (6) going much better than her recent form reads. Gets another chance after the eye-catching run when eighth in the LR Gai Waterhouse over 1200m at Ipswich. Can race closer and give this a shake. ELOUYOU (7) showed a stack of fight up on the speed at Caulfield from the outside gate. Stays in the mix from another awkward draw.
